Tencent Holdings ( (HK:0700) ) has issued an announcement.

Tencent Holdings announced the grant of 20,287 options to subscribe for shares to its employee participants under its Share Option Scheme. data.title: CMON Limited Proposes Share Structure Changes
data.description:
Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

An announcement from CMON Limited ( (HK:1792) ) is now available.

CMON Limited, a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, has announced a series of proposed changes to its share structure. These include an increase in authorized share capital from HK$380,000 to HK$1,750,000, a share consolidation where every 35 existing shares will be consolidated into one new share, and a change in the board lot size for trading from 70,000 existing shares to 2,000 consolidated shares. These proposals are subject to shareholder approval at an upcoming extraordinary general meeting (EGM). The changes aim to streamline the company’s share structure and potentially enhance trading liquidity.

More about CMON Limited

Chongqing Iron & Steel Co., Ltd. announced the resignation of Mr. Meng Wenwang from his roles as director, president, and member of the Strategy and Risk Committee due to work adjustments.
